display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Brookland's Concorde 'Delta Golf' has a makeover, in time for a visit from Concorde royalty.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A volunteer is tasked with restoring a legendary Le Mans racer. A decommissioned bomb proves difficult, and can the experts revive the dormant engines of a transatlantic flyer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he arrives to collect the owner's pre-war Alvis and an immaculate Citroen used by the Gestapo in occupied France.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is picking up two expertly crafted Batmobile replicas in the home counties and Dave can't control his enthusiasm for a Ford US wartime jeep.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The hugely respected chronology of WWII. Churchill described Italy as the 'soft underbelly of the crocodile', thinking the Allies could cut through it to reach Germany.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to Hatfield House in Hertfordshire, where items up for valuation include a four-headed doll and a life-size stuffed lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public bring keepsakes and rarities to be valued at Winchester Cathedral, including an unusual relic from the Charge of the Light Brigade.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek waxes lyrical about a pristine Jaguar XJ8 and a Ford Model T van tests his driving skills.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The hugely respected chronology of WWII. Churchill described Italy as the 'soft underbelly of the crocodile', thinking the Allies could cut through it to reach Germany.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to Hatfield House in Hertfordshire, where items up for valuation include a four-headed doll and a life-size stuffed lion.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's narrowboat gets stuck under a low bridge on the challenging Basingstoke Canal as he battles through water weed. Can he make it to journey's end.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A legendary diesel locomotive, that's undergone over half a million pounds worth of repairs must be hauled over 40 miles ready for a diesel gala.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his epic adventure. On the third leg of his journey, he rejoins the Tropic of Cancer in Egypt and follows it through Saudi Arabia, Dubai and Oman.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek waxes lyrical about a pristine Jaguar XJ8 and a Ford Model T van tests his driving skills.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin tries to help a 1978 Austin Allegro's owner with their wonky suspension, but must call in the cavalry when a piece of specialist kit packs in.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The duo rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Brookland's Concorde 'Delta Golf' has a makeover, in time for a visit from Concorde royalty.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Racing driver Billy Monger gives a fellow double amputee a driving lesson and a fire engine gets pumping for the first time in years.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The legendary Railton Napier has a service and some treasure is found in the museum tower whilst a 100-year-old push bike gets a wooden wheel built.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek inspects old cop cars including a Rover P6 complete with radio, sirens and V8 engine, and a former Mod waves ciao to his collection of 1960s Italian scooters.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the acclaimed documentary series on WWII. Hear how Japanese advances across Asia forced the Allies into ignominious retreat.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Scientists in Kamienna Gora work to keep the Luftwaffe flying but are they also building Hitler's next revenge weapon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: More keepsakes and rarities are valued at Winchester Cathedral, including a recipe book from Jane Austen's household and a four-barrelled golden pistol.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Hutton-in-the-Forest, a country house in Cumbria, where items include a painting that was once used for target practice.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days but he's still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that's come from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the acclaimed documentary series on WWII. Hear how Japanese advances across Asia forced the Allies into ignominious retreat.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Scientists in Kamienna Gora work to keep the Luftwaffe flying but are they also building Hitler's next revenge weapon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: More keepsakes and rarities are valued at Winchester Cathedral, including a recipe book from Jane Austen's household and a four-barrelled golden pistol.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie moors by Hampton Court Palace, but disaster strikes when a tree branch smashes a window. His dad joins to help through Hanwell locks.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie head south for an immaculate Lotus Super 7. Derek and Jack are in Sheffield collecting a 1929 Riley Monaco and a 1924 Alvis 12/50 tourer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days but he's still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that's come from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Young designer Prad has just 30 days to reinvent the model railway starter kit, and musician Jools Holland reveals his incredible 45ft layout hidden away in his loft.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Young designer Tom has his work cut out creating a new model of the record-breaking British jet the Vampire with its unusual space age look.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The Hornby team race to complete a model of the giant P2, The Prince of Wales locomotive, determined to be the first to bring a model of this giant to market.

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Hornby's Scalextric team attempt to tap into the brand's glory years, the 1980's, and devise a plan to create a model of a classic supercar, the Lamborghini Countach.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson discovers how the Cornish village of Botallack was the centre of the Cornish tin and copper mining industry and supplied a deadly poison to the world.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A look at the moments that nearly stopped the Expedition teams in their tracks, to the points where taking one step further meant no turning back.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A look at close encounters with creatures, including the world's largest land predator and close encounters in flooded caves and on sheer cliffs.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: We unpack the story of the world class teams behind five expeditions. From the remote Arctic wilderness to flooded caves of Mexico their expertise are key.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A special look behind the scenes at the work of Steve's crew - going back to examine some of their most daring explorations.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A look at the moments that nearly stopped the Expedition teams in their tracks, to the points where taking one step further meant no turning back.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A look at close encounters with creatures, including the world's largest land predator and close encounters in flooded caves and on sheer cliffs.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: We unpack the story of the world class teams behind five expeditions. From the remote Arctic wilderness to flooded caves of Mexico their expertise are key.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A special look behind the scenes at the work of Steve's crew - going back to examine some of their most daring explorations.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree; Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire for a 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport styled by Milan coachbuilder Zagato.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a Morgan sports car; a WWII ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale and a Ford Model T needs a new home. S5 Ep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons welcome a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine, and Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van previously used to carry bread in Paris.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Discover the treacherous working conditions faced by Peterhead's trawler fishermen. Pair trawlers Ocean Dawn and Sunrise tackle ferocious weather and problems with a new net.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: More storm-lashed action from the trawler fishermen of Peterhead in Scotland. Blown across the North Sea, the Sunrise and Ocean Dawn skippers must take shelter in Bergen in Norway.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Scottish fishing crews negotiate perilous waters in the observational series. The young crew of the prawn trawler New Dawn deal with the devastating loss of one of their shipmates.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: The reality series that's all at sea with a crew of hardy Scottish trawler fishermen. Join the two greatest skippers of their generation aboard the Fruitful Bough and the Rosebloom.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Experience the harsh realities of life at sea with Scottish trawler fishermen. A team goes extreme crabbing in the worst weather seen in the programme's history - hold on tight.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport styled by Milan coachbuilder Zagato.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a Morgan sports car; a WWII ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale and a Ford Model T needs a new home. S5 Ep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons welcome a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine, and Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van previously used to carry bread in Paris.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree; Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers evidence of the German occupation of the Jersey village of Gorey and the role it played in defending the UK.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides USA Road Trip moves to the Deep South. In the state of Louisiana, our Guides discover the music, food and culture that makes the Deep South something special.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer thinks Bart's new Muslim friend belongs to a family of terrorists; Lisa acquires her first MP3 device. S20 E7

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: More gadgets, more minions, more mayhem! As Gru (Steve Carell) turns his back on his baddie ways to care for his girls, a secret agency recruits him to fight evil. (2013)

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny's worlds collide. Eden and Cash reach an impasse. Beau has his sights on Harper.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage seeks closeness.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: MasterChef alum and social media star Khanh Ong sets an epic challenge to create a bold, out-there sandwich with a banging cross section, to win the first immunity pin of the season. S18 E15

programme.title: Jimmy Carr's Am I The A**Hole?
programme.desc: Those confessing tonight include a man who faked having a baby, an unrepentant snorer and someone who took the law into their own hands to get out of a date. S1 E3

programme.title: Taskmaster Australia
programme.desc: Brett Blake is driven to destruction by a task featuring roman numerals, the teams are back with their best reality shows and things get precarious with some dangling of precious items. S5 E4

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Season Finale: A long‑awaited achievement sparks an office celebration that brings unresolved feelings and realizations to the surface. S1 E20

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Herding ping-pong balls, playing catch around the globe and creating food-based injuries are just three of the tasks on offer as the show reaches its halfway point. S8 E5

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While on a date, Stokes realises a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation. S12 E3

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A mother-daughter trip to paradise is cut short by a shocking crime. S8 E7

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Series Final: Everyone’s story reaches a surprising yet inevitable conclusion. S5 E13

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Ellen returns to Patty's apartment for a party to celebrate Tom's tenth anniversary at the firm. S2 E5

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: MasterChef alum and social media star Khanh Ong sets an epic challenge to create a bold, out-there sandwich with a banging cross section, to win the first immunity pin of the season. S18 E15

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage seeks closeness.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny's worlds collide. Eden and Cash reach an impasse. Beau has his sights on Harper.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides are off on a Sunshine Coast to Fraser Island outdoor adventure, complete with four-wheel driving, camping, hiking, skydiving, and E-Foiling.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Lisa tries to find a habitat for endangered bees, Mr. Burns builds a state-of-the-art sports arena, which happens to look like a giant hive. S20 E8

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the midst of an identity crisis. Starring Steve Carell. (2017)

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Matt struggles to deal with a patient from his past. Bruce tries to rekindle romance with a former flame. S2 E6

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny tells a lie. Harper goes out on a date. Cash and Eden are fractured.

programme.title: Ready Gamer Mum
programme.desc: In the season's penultimate episode, the gamers and Mums enter the ring to play WWE, the professional wrestling sports game.

programme.title: Don't Date Brandon
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Two women discover they dated the same deceptive man they met online. After launching a podcast about their experiences with Brandon, more victims emerge. S1 E1

programme.title: Don't Get Married
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Hopeless romantic, Bailey, is falling out-of-love with love. But never fear Bubbah is on the case as she uncovers the actual factual truth about marriage and relationships. S1 E1

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne takes scrupulous notes as Paul Sinha squats in a telephone box, and Iain Stirling stakes his claim for the Scottish national football team. Also Starring Joe Thomas and Lou Sanders. S8 E6

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The former Mayor of Las Vegas is shot at the Mob Museum and the CSIs embark on a history lesson in search of clues. S12 E4

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: In a deadly race against the clock, authorities must piece together a string of murders led by a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. S8 E8

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty wages a media war against Walter Kendrick, whom she believes to be responsible for Christine Purcell's murder. S2 E6

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Dr. Ken
programme.desc: Pat eyes a promotion and asks Ken to put a good word in for him with the CEO of Welltopia; Clark suspects Damona and Pat are dating again. S2 E20

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in the 19th century. A dishevelled Detective Murdoch is on the run in England, suffering from amnesia.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When Todd agrees to help Susan's fiance locate a missing employee, he stumbles into a case Margaret agreed to co-counsel with Gus.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Victorian mystery series set in Toronto. Murdoch probes a case of Masonic murder when an initiate is killed, and soon uncovers another secret society.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mesmerising mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Brackenreid's son is kidnapped in a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A visit to Chummy's holiday camp leads to another murder mystery for the sleuthing cleric.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to a car park where an undercover policewoman has been shot, and learns she was trying to find evidence against a drug dealer - whose henchmen later kidnap him.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing in The Barrens and suspicion falls on her boyfriend, it's up to the team to uncover the truth behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie helps a Secret Service investigation into a counterfeiting ring, but things get a little tricky when a bag is thrown over her head and she is hurled into a van.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The murder of a festival queen puts a strain on Florence's relationship when it turns out Patrice knew the victim.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Victorian mystery series set in Toronto. Murdoch probes a case of Masonic murder when an initiate is killed, and soon uncovers another secret society.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mesmerising mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Brackenreid's son is kidnapped in a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to a car park where an undercover policewoman has been shot, and learns she was trying to find evidence against a drug dealer - whose henchmen later kidnap him.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing in The Barrens and suspicion falls on her boyfriend, it's up to the team to uncover the truth behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A visit to Chummy's holiday camp leads to another murder mystery for the sleuthing cleric.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie helps a Secret Service investigation into a counterfeiting ring, but things get a little tricky when a bag is thrown over her head and she is hurled into a van.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The murder of a festival queen puts a strain on Florence's relationship when it turns out Patrice knew the victim.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Amidst several personal revelations, Arch's investigation into Gallagher comes to a head when a murdered body washes up the shore.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A visit to Chummy's holiday camp leads to another murder mystery for the sleuthing cleric.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The murder of a festival queen puts a strain on Florence's relationship when it turns out Patrice knew the victim.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing in The Barrens and suspicion falls on her boyfriend, it's up to the team to uncover the truth behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Victorian mystery series set in Toronto. Murdoch probes a case of Masonic murder when an initiate is killed, and soon uncovers another secret society.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Todd gets caught up in a scheme orchestrated by his former partner Veronica, which might potentially land him in prison on a felony charge.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mesmerising mystery series set in the 19th century. Alexander Reynolds is knifed to death at his own 60th birthday party.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson tackles another mystery in 19th century Toronto. A Rembrandt painting is stolen from the enigmatic art collector, James Pendrick.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls' borstal.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick believes a car bomb was intended for a former American football star, so he sets up a ruse to make the killer believe the athlete is dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Charlie's estranged brother is accused of the death of his recent boxing opponent, Charlie and the team wrestle with the possibility of his guilt.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the death of a beaten-up boxer, but the clues suggest that he appears to have neither tried to defend himself nor fought back at his killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mesmerising mystery series set in the 19th century. Alexander Reynolds is knifed to death at his own 60th birthday party.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson tackles another mystery in 19th century Toronto. A Rembrandt painting is stolen from the enigmatic art collector, James Pendrick.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick believes a car bomb was intended for a former American football star, so he sets up a ruse to make the killer believe the athlete is dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Charlie's estranged brother is accused of the death of his recent boxing opponent, Charlie and the team wrestle with the possibility of his guilt.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls' borstal.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the death of a beaten-up boxer, but the clues suggest that he appears to have neither tried to defend himself nor fought back at his killer.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Amidst several personal revelations, Arch's investigation into Gallagher comes to a head when a murdered body washes up the shore.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The padre has his work cut out when the discovery of a body in a locked room prompts local speculation to mount that Kembleford is under threat of an alien invasion.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Clarkson's Farm
programme.desc: Reeling from the council's rejection of his restaurant proposal and the money spent on its preparation, Clarkson must focus on turning a profit on his farm.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: The Great Escapers
programme.desc: The Chasers in Rhodes - The Chase stars Mark Labbett, Jenny Ryan and Shaun Wallace head to the Greek island of Rhodes where they compete to throw the best holiday!

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes has finally been given permission to stage her own Nativity Play and is determined to put on the greatest show on earth. Wonder how that will go down?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage seeks closeness.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: On day one of the Defence, Colby challenges the case and gets a lead on the elusive ‘John’. S3 E5

programme.title: Nothing Trivial
programme.desc: Catherine runs into some big obstacles, as Mac and Nige battle for Brian’s soul. But can Brian resist temptation? S2 E12

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to the Kent coast to help a seaside B&B battling against a tide of competition and no bookings. S20 E2

programme.title: Dear Life
programme.desc: Lillian faces funeral debt while Mary spirals over news that Ash’s killer might walk free. Andrew offers to help fight the legal battle. S1 E2

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: It’s party time in the Brown household as the family celebrate the baptism of Dermot and Maria’s triplets!

programme.title: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Season Finale: Levi returns to Unbreakable determined to follow his heart, while Neelam overcomes a major set-back. S3 E6

programme.title: First Crossings
programme.desc: Kevin and Jamie re-trace the first ascent of Mount de la Beche by Tom Fyfe and George Graham in 1894 - the first major peak conquered by New Zealand-born climbers.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.
